title: Richly Smoked Canadian Chicken Skillet
description: A hearty weeknight Canadian dish featuring smoked chicken, garlic sauce, and a blend of savory flavors, all made without added sugar.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the smoked paprika, garlic powder, salt, and pepper to the skillet and stir to combine.
Pour in the chicken broth and garlic sauce, and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to medium-low and let cook for 10-12 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Use two forks to shred the chicken into bite-sized pieces.
Return the skillet to the stovetop and simmer the sauce over medium heat until it has thickened slightly.
Serve the chicken and sauce hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
